issues.title: RetrievalAugmentationAdvisor doesn't seem to be compatible with Azure AI Search

comments.body: Ah okay, I should have recreated a index. There `meta_testSuiteId` should exist.

issues.title: Features that Springai must support
issues.body:
1. I want to use springai to build a large model of dialogue requests, but I want the LLM to return as is, and not to encapsulate springai
2. I want to know what request parameters springai sent to the LLM

comments.body:
> I want to know what request parameters springai sent to the LLM

You can log the request body by customizing the Rest Client.

The following link will help:
https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/issues/883#issuecomment-2739772323

issues.title: ChatClient or chatmodel  build chatting with 》spring-ai-openai-spring-boot-starter 》 is error，  org.springframework.ai.retry.NonTransientAiException: 400 - Bad Request
issues.body:
**Bug description**

the same v1/completions api via destop client cherry studio or restful api  for chatting is ok，but based spring ai  with package  <spring-ai-openai-spring-boot-starter>  use ChatClient or chatmodel is error，exception info ：

comments.body:
com.alibaba.cloud.ai.example.chat.openai.controller.ChatClientController.simpleChat(ChatClientController.java:88)
Can you share the code of this part?

---

Based on the content of the logs, I think the 400 error might have occurred from the Alibaba API.
Could you please share the specific response body?

> com.alibaba.cloud.ai.example.chat.openai.controller.ChatClientController.simpleChat(ChatClientController.java:88) Can you share the code of this part?
> 
> Based on the content of the logs, I think the 400 error might have occurred from the Alibaba API. Could you please share the specific response body?

that is a alibaba simple project example， i use based spring ai to build the chatting ，also  occured  this problem  ，the  code of part ：

ChatClient：

    public static final String DEFAULT_PROMPT = "你好，请吹个牛！";

    public final ChatClient chatClient;


    public CommonController(ChatClient.Builder chatClient) {
        this.chatClient = chatClient
                .defaultAdvisors(new MessageChatMemoryAdvisor(new InMemoryChatMemory()))
                .defaultAdvisors(new SimpleLoggerAdvisor())
                .build();
    }




controller:

    @GetMapping("/simple/chat")
    public String simpleChat() {

        try {
            return chatClient.prompt(DEFAULT_PROMPT).call().content();
        } catch (Exception e) {
            // 记录错误日志
            System.err.println("Failed to call OpenAI API: " + e.getMessage());
            return "Error: " + e.getMessage();
        }
    }

application.propertis:

spring.ai.openai.base-url=http://llm.api.xxxxx.com
spring.ai.openai.chat.options.model=deepseek-v3
